name: english-learning-harness
description: Codex-native English conversation harness for Korean adult learners.

interface.shortDescription: Turn Codex conversation into gentle English practice with local learner memory.
interface.longDescription: English Learning Harness keeps the learner in Codex conversation while the repository's local engine handles setup, evidence, review memory, and progress persistence internally. It defaults to text/transcription-first sessions because realtime voice is not yet a stable CLI path.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start a gentle English learning session using the learner's local profile and progress.
